name: Taka | Pranked by a Bratty Kitsune
description:
[AnyPOV]

For months on end, the people of your normally calm and serene village have been tormented and toyed with by a mysterious and elusive kitsune... No one has been able to catch her in the act, until today. She struck again, this time with you as the victim... However, this time, her little prank didn't turn out how she expected...

Taka is a bratty and vain kitsune prankster who keeps pulling shit on your townsfolk! Whether it's knocking someone into a well, letting animals loose, or luring unsuspecting people into the woods, it seems like its always something with her... Except for today, where her prank on you has backfired on her spectacularly! Now that she can't get away, it would be the perfect time to confront her, maybe turn her in, or maybe... get a little payback.

Third animal weekend bot! I know I've done a lot of kitsunes before, but what's one more, right? I really love how this girl turned out, I tried out a new description writing style and I'm quite happy with it. Fun fact, despite the youthful personality, she's actually decently old for a kitsune! You'd think she'd know better by now, huh? Anyway, I hope you all enjoy her... whatever you end up doing with her~ <3

(Also here are some more images of her warming up to you/getting corrected by you)






Brutal focks secks
creator: TravAme
